name: Cane Bay Family YMCA
description: Cane Bay Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Summerville, SC. There are 15 wood and concrete courts. 12 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include water, restrooms, and locker rooms. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: Central Creek Park
description: All courts are open

name: Cresswind Charleston
description: Cresswind Charleston is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Summerville, SC. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Daniel Island Recreation Center
description: Daniel Island Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hobcaw Point, SC. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Del Webb @Cane Bay Pickleball Club
description: Del Webb @Cane Bay Pickleball Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Summerville, SC. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Doty Park Summerville
description: Doty Park Summerville is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Summerville, SC. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include water.

name: Goose Creek Community Center
description: Located inside the fitness center, there are two gymnasiums with portable nets available.
fees: Private — You either need a yearly membership to the center ($60/year for GC residents) or a $2/day fee to access gymnasium for play.

name: Hanahan Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Hanahan Recreation Center in Hanahan, SC! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: K. Hovnanian's Four Seasons at Lakes of Cane Bay
description: Come play pickleball at K. Hovnanian's Four Seasons at Lakes of Cane Bay in Summerville, SC! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: LTP on Daniel Island
description: Come play pickleball at LTP on Daniel Island in Hobcaw Point, SC! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, water, and restrooms.

name: Middleton Park
description: This is a private court for use by Crowfield HOA residents.

name: Midtown Nexton Summerville
description: Private key fob accessible only for residents of Midtown, Brighton Park, and Del Webb communities.

name: Rollins Edwards Community Center
description: Rollins Edwards Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Summerville, SC. There are 5 concrete and wood courts. 2 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and locker rooms. The courts are private.

name: Saul Alexander Park Playground
description: Saul Alexander Park Playground is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Summerville, SC. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Stratford High School
description: Come play pickleball at Stratford High School in Goose Creek, SC! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Summerville Family YMCA at the Ponds
description: Come play pickleball at Summerville Family YMCA at the Ponds in Summerville, SC! There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Free for YMCA members, guests can play by paying a guest fee.

name: Summerville Family YMCA Downtown Branch
description: Summerville Family YMCA Downtown Branch is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Summerville, SC. There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: The Club at Pine Forest
description: Featuring Charleston’s only premiere clay court facility, Pine Forest strives to redefine Pickleball in the Lowcountry. With six regulation Pickleball courts and two practice warmup areas, you can enjoy America’s fastest growing game today. Reservations Recommended. Check out https://clubatpineforest.com/pickleball for more info.
open_play_schedule: Pine Forest Uses the Court Reserve App for court and ball machine reservations
fees: Members only — $125 per year plus one time $20 admin fee plus taxes

name: The Hamlets at Crowfield Plantation
description: The Hamlets at Crowfield Plantation is a place to play pickleball in Goose Creek, SC. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: The Pickle Bar
description: The Pickle Bar is a place to play pickleball in Summerville, SC. There are 9 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and locker rooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: White Gables Tennis Courts- Private Community
description: This is a private community.  Courts are only  for the residents/owners of the HOA.  These  are not  public courts.
